title: CBSE class 12 result 2026 LIVE: ‘Coming soon’ post sparks frenzy among students; no update on cbseresults.nic.in yet
description: CBSE class 12 result 2026 LIVE: CBSE Class 12 results are expected today and can be checked on DigiLocker, cbse.gov.in, cbseresults.nic.in, and UMANG, among others.
